rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE EDITH RITA FARRELL REVOCABLE INTERVIVOS TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Dismiss And Demurrer To Verified Petition For L. Farrell For Order Directing Payment Of Funds In Blocked Account; Points And Authorities;Request For Judicial Notice With Exhibits.
rulings.Rulings: Notice of Motion to Dismiss and Demurrer to petition for order directing payment of funds in blocked account. Tentative ruling: Motion to dismiss is denied. Demurrer - overruled. REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE THE COURT TAKES JUDICIAL NOTICE THAT A VERIFIED PETITION FOR ORDER SETTING ASIDE NON-FINAL ORDER AND GRANTING LEAVE TO FILE VERIFIED PETITION TO REFORM TRUST INSTRUMENT WAS FILED 1/4/10; THAT THERE IS AN APPELLANT'S INDEX FILE DIN A125289; AND THAT A RECEIPT AND ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF ORDER FOR DEPOSIT OF MONEY INTO BLOCKED ACCOUNT WAS FILED.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE EDITH RITA FARRELL REVOCABLE INTERVIVOS TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Directing Payment Of Funds In Blocked Account
rulings.Rulings: Petition for Order Directing Payment of Fund in Blocked Account. Tentative ruling: Continue to determine if Donald Farrell will file a petition to reform the trust.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE EDITH RITA FARRELL REVOCABLE INTERVIVOS TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Motion For Sanctions Against Trustee'S Attorney
rulings.Rulings: Motion for sanctions filed against the trustee's attorney. Tentative ruling: Denied. Mr. Canatella's Cross Motion to Stike and for Sanctions. Tenative ruling: Denied. Request for Judicial Notice dated 8/24/10 A. Farrell's/McGill's 8/7/09 Motion for Sanctions - court takes judicial notice that this was filed B. Farrell's/McGill's 6/8/09 Motion for Sanctions - court takes judicial notice that this was filed C. Order after Hearing filed 6/30/09 - the court takes judicial notice of the Order D. Reporter's Transcript of Proceedings 6/29/09 - the courts take judicial notice of the Transcript E. Notice of Appeal filed 6/4/09 by Donald Farrell - the courts take judicial notice that this was filed Request for Judicial Notice dated 12/18/09 A. 8/7/09 Motion for Sanctions - the court takes judicial notice that this was filed B. 6/8/09 Motion for Sanctions - the court takes judicial notice that this was filed C. Reporter's Transcript of 7/30/09 - the court takes judicial notice of the transcript
